rationale: Educ. Code §11.167 governs school district operations outside district boundaries and is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may operate a school or program, including an extracurricular program, or hold a class outside the boundaries of the district.
_note: Rule text is topically unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
